news.t: Innovator ETFs® Launches the Innovator Equity Premium Income - Daily PutWrite ETF (SPUT)

holdings.infoBox: SPUT is an equity ETF with a total of 503 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills stock at 48.75%, NVIDIA at 3.81%, Apple at 3.31%, Microsoft at 2.28%, and Amazon.com at 1.82%.

overview.description: The Innovator Daily PutWrite ETF (SPUT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively pursues exposure to US large-cap equities, while providing monthly income through a daily options put-writing strategy. SPUT was launched on Mar 14, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.

data.title: Innovator ETFs® Launches the Innovator Equity Premium Income - Daily PutWrite ETF (SPUT)
data.text: CHICAGO, March 14, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Innovator Capital Management, LLC (Innovator), pioneer and provider of the first and largest lineup of Defined Outcome ETFs™, today announced the launch of ...
